summary: Verified bootstrap.sh env-local fix — all 9 pytest checks pass. .gitignore now un-ignores .env.local.example (negation rule matched via git check-ignore, no ignored-status entry). ensure-env-local.sh handles all 3 scenarios correctly (inline template when both missing, copy from example when present, idempotent when .env.local already exists). bootstrap.sh delegates to helper (no fragile inline cp). Real .env.local.example contains all 7 required keys. smoke-test.sh regression: PASS 32 checks green.
critical_code_review_comments: ensure-env-local.sh inline template duplicates .env.local.example content — code comment already flags drift risk; consider having the example be the single source and shipping it as a heredoc consumed by both example + helper if drift becomes a problem.

bootstrap.sh section 'scripts/.env.local' does not verify helper exit code separately (relies on set -e), which is fine but a section-level 'ok' message runs unconditionally after — acceptable given set -euo pipefail.
seed_data_creation: None — each test uses pytest tmp_path fixture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shell-level fix verification only. Existing backend_test.py from iteration_1 was not re-run per request. New test file lives at /app/backend/tests/test_ensure_env_local.py and is safe to re-run (uses tmp_path, does not touch the real /app/ProfilePilot/scripts/.env.local).
